policy.purpose: Same canonical 137 feature pool, different consumer views. Do not collapse L1 strategy, L1.25, PLE, ML training, and alpha mining into one scorer.
policy.no_201_invariant: Views must derive from unified_feature_registry_v1; no consumer may maintain an independent 95+106+701 soup.
policy.ml_training_rule: ml_training_view defines candidates and transforms only; monthly/weekly feature selection still owns active ML feature choice.
policy.strategy_rule: strategy_view remains threshold-friendly evidence for L1 labeler, not a ranker.
policy.ple_rule: ple_router_view may consume governed feature evidence plus strategy matrix and L1.25 priors; it must not replace L2/L3.
